title: Rich German Bread Stir-fry
description: A keto-friendly German dish featuring wholegrain bread and stir-fry, rich in flavor and fatty acids, this dish is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Slice the wholegrain bread into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions to the skillet and cook until they are caramelized.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pork sausage to the skillet and cook until it is browned.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the bread cubes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with gruyere cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
